//: Permission profile for UNATTENDED, Teams-triggered FLASH-P runs. Loaded via `claude --settings`.
//mode: Used with `--permission-mode dontAsk`: nothing prompts; anything not allowed is denied; deny always wins.
//defense: Primary containment is at the bridge layer (only `/run-flashp-gxe|epistasis <known-network>` is ever sent). This deny-list is the second layer: it blocks destructive / exfiltration / repo-mutating shell verbs even though the agent is only ever asked to do read-only analysis.
